title: Assertion fault following ROLLBACK with running queries
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, age INT CHECK(age >= 0), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, age) VALUES ('Bob', NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE age IS NULL;
key_bug_features: ROLLBACK with running queries causes assertion fault
